subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him, the Lord of the heavenly throne and earthly realm, Who hath through His conquering might transformed the opposition of the ungodly into acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک عرش و فرش را لایق و سزا که اعراض مشرکین را بقوه غالبه باقبال تبدیل
